artPrompt: The chaotic instant of a snap election: a ring of hands slamming down on a long table all at once amid an election-night riot, goblins roaring around a triumphant figure raised on shoulders, coins and confetti flung into the ember air. A single bonfire blast lights the blur of pounding fists, the rioting square swallowed by night-black smoke. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Landslide Victory
text:
Hold a snap election. Every player at the table simultaneously slaps the table once for each Goblin you control. Whoever's hand lands last is the loser of the election (this is not how elections work, the Mayor doesn't care).
Landslide Victory deals damage equal to the number of Goblins you control, divided as you choose among the loser and their permanents. Then create a Goblin token for the spectacle of it all.
flavorText: He won by a margin no one was allowed to verify.
